backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing a paste-sharing service with blob storage, access control, user profiles, paste CRUD operations with expiration times, password protection, and legacy ID migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining type aliases and a no-op migration function that preserves existing state (pasteMap, legacyIdMap, userProfiles) across canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no documented features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of frontend source files including components, pages, hooks, utilities, and configuration files with detailed descriptions of their functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tags, page title describing the paste bin application features, and script tag loading the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component with QueryClient provider, theme provider, hash-based routing logic that renders CreatePastePage, HistoryPage, or PasteViewPage based on URL hash with paste ID validation.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout wrapper component providing header with logo/navigation, conditional History link for authenticated users, LoginButton, main content area, and footer with attribution link.
frontend/src/components/ErrorState.tsx: Reusable error display component showing different states (expired, not-found, error) with icons, messages, optional paste ID details in a code block, and retry button.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component managing Internet Identity login/logout with loading states, error handling for duplicate authentication, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/PasteEditModal.t: Modal component for editing existing pastes, allowing users to modify text content, add new files, change password, and extend expiration. Handles file uploads with progress tracking and merges existing file chunks with new ones.
frontend/src/components/UploadProgressSt: Displays upload progress UI with a spinner, progress bar, and file information showing current file number, total files, filename, and percentage complete.
frontend/src/config/pasteLimits.ts: Configuration file defining file size limits for paste uploads (50MB default), exported as both MB and byte constants.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with delegation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for paste operations including create, edit, delete, extend expiration, and fetch operations with file upload progress tracking and error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, shared card component styles, and base styling for the application.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePastePage.tsx: Main page for creating new pastes with text and file uploads, featuring authentication checks, password protection, expiration settings, file size validation, upload progress display, and shareable URL generation.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays authenticated user's paste history with loading states, error handling, and edit functionality via PasteEditModal. Shows empty state with call-to-action if no pastes exist.
frontend/src/pages/PasteViewPage.tsx: Renders individual paste view with owner badge, file downloads, and expiration timer. Handles expired/not-found/error states with custom error UI and type guards.
frontend/src/utils/actorFactory.ts: Provides centralized actor creation functions for anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) backend connections, avoiding double-configuration warnings.
frontend/src/utils/backendError.ts: Normalizes backend errors into user-friendly messages and detects authentication-related errors for proper handling.
frontend/src/utils/draftEditorDiagnostic: Suppresses non-blocking draft-editor origin warnings from the Caffeine platform's preview system to reduce console noise.
frontend/src/utils/fileDownload.ts: Handles file downloads from ExternalBlob with proper filename inference from MIME types and fallback naming strategies.
frontend/src/utils/formatRemainingTime.t: Converts nanosecond bigint timestamps into human-readable time strings with minute granularity (e.g., '2 hrs 45 min').
frontend/src/utils/pasteIds.ts: Validates, normalizes, and extracts paste IDs from routes, supporting both legacy numeric and new GUID formats with URL decoding.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with support for persisting parameters in sessionStorage and clearing sensitive data from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), container queries, typography plugin, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking three pending issues: draft editor origin errors, backend paste retrieval returning null for valid IDs, and paste ID format consistency between creation and retrieval.
